ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type (e.g., robbery, assault, burglary, theft) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the crime occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the crime incident */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the crime incident */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location type (e.g., commercial, residential, public) */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the severity level (e.g., major, moderate, minor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the crime incident (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number for the crime incident */,
  "incident_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_location_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES severities ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "crime_category" TEXT /* Category of the crime type (e.g., violent, non-violent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_locations" (
  "incident_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident location */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the crime occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incident_locations_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incident_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant (e.g., victim, perpetrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incident_participants_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., physical, testimonial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the evidence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incident_evidence_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "witness_name" TEXT /* Name of the witness */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Statement given by the witness */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the witness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incident_witnesses_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incident_officers_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, submitted, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incident_reports_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_pattern_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_details" TEXT /* Details of the analysis */,
  "analysis_conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_pattern_analysis_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES crime_trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_prevention_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_prevention_strategies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_prevention_strategies_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investigator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the crime data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of export */,
  "export_file" TEXT /* File path to the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user importing the crime data */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of import */,
  "import_file" TEXT /* File path to the imported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date of analytics */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Analytics data for crime trends and patterns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_analytics_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_analytics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
